title: carex globosa
intro: Carex globosa, also known as the Globe Sedge or Globe-leaved Sedge, is a species of sedge, a type of perennial grass-like plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carex globosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Carex globosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
